welcome:
👋 Welcome!

Here you can get a subscription right inside this bot.
Tap the button below to choose a plan.
menu_hint: Pick a section from the menu below 👇
plan_no_active: No plans available yet. Please check back later.
email_ask:
✉️ To complete the subscription, please provide your e-mail.
We'll send the receipt and payment confirmation there:
email_invalid: ❌ That doesn't look like an e-mail. Please enter a valid address:
payment_created:
🧾 Invoice created.
Tap the button below to proceed to payment.
payment_error: ⚠️ Could not create the invoice. Please try again later or contact support.
payment_success_notify: ✅ Payment received! Your subscription is active until {date}.
channel_access:
🔓 Access to the private channel is open!
Tap the button below to join (single-use link).
subscription_expired:
⌛ Your subscription has ended, access to the private channel is paused.
Renew to come back.
subscription_active: 💳 Your subscription Plan: {title} Status: active ✅ Valid until: {date}
subscription_none:
You don't have an active subscription yet.
Get one in the “Plans” section.
account_tz_ask: Send your timezone as UTC±HH (e.g. UTC+3):
account_tz_invalid: ❌ Invalid format. Example: UTC+3 or UTC-5
